opsec.config.title: OpSec Settings
opsec.section.restartWarning: §e⚠ Requires game restart to take effect
opsec.option.spoofAsVanilla.tooltip:
On: advertise a vanilla brand and block ALL mod(s) from detection
Off: advertise as real Fabric brand and optionally allow some mod(s)
opsec.option.whitelistMode.locked.toolti: Locked to 'Block All' because Spoof as Vanilla is on
opsec.whitelist.mode.auto.tooltip: Mods with network channels are automatically whitelisted
opsec.whitelist.mode.custom.tooltip: Manually select which mods to whitelist
opsec.packstrip.mode.manual.tooltip: Default vanilla behavior on push. You can still toggle any server pack
opsec.packstrip.mode.ask.tooltip: Server resource pack not applied but with consent screen to ask if the pack(s) should be applied
opsec.packstrip.mode.alwaysOn.tooltip: Server resource pack not applied by default. You can still toggle any server pack
opsec.packstrip.title: Server Resource Pack
opsec.packstrip.required: This server has a required resource pack.
opsec.packstrip.optional: This server has an optional resource pack.
opsec.packstrip.stripped: §7OpSec bypassed this pack's content. You may apply it below.
opsec.account.addSession.tooltip: Add a new account using a session token
opsec.account.addOffline.tooltip: Add an offline account (username only, no auth)
opsec.update.title: OpSec Update Available
opsec.update.message: A new version of OpSec is available!
opsec.tamper.title: OpSec Integrity Warning
opsec.tamper.mismatch: The running jar does not match the official release.
opsec.tamper.malicious: This may indicate the file has been modified with malicious code.
opsec.tamper.compromised: §cYour computer may have already been compromised.
opsec.tamper.action: §cIf you did not modify this file yourself, take immediate action.
opsec.alert.shaderStrip.multi: Stripped server-pack shader overrides targeting %d mods: %s
opsec.hint.alertsCanBeDisabled: Chat and toast alerts can be disabled in OpSec > Misc settings.
opsec.command.help.info: /opsec info [mod]  - Show tracked mods or details for a specific mod
opsec.command.help.channels: /opsec channels    - Show all tracked network channels
opsec.command.overview.noMods: No mods with trackable content found.
opsec.command.info.useList: Use /opsec info to see available mods
opsec.whitelist.tooltip.requiredBy: %s — required by %s (uncheck the depender to release)
opsec.command.info.statusBlockedAuto: Whitelist Status: BLOCKED (AUTO mode - no channels)
opsec.command.channels.none: No channels tracked yet. Try /opsec scan
opsec.account.screen.session.title: Add Account
opsec.account.screen.offline.title: Add Offline Account
opsec.button.reset.disabled.tooltip: Reset is disabled on Accounts tab
opsec.option.isolatePackCache.tooltip: Store packs per-account to prevent fingerprinting
opsec.option.blockLocalPackUrls.tooltip: Block local URL resource pack requests
opsec.option.stripModShaders.tooltip: Strip server resource pack shader overrides targeting non-whitelisted mods
opsec.option.clearCache.tooltip:
Deletes all cached server resource packs
Also resets download queue state
opsec.option.keyResolutionSpoofing.toolt: Mask translation key values to appear as default vanilla client
opsec.option.fakeDefaultKeybinds.tooltip: Spoof vanilla keybinds to default values when enabled
opsec.option.meteorFix.tooltip: Blacklist a Meteor Client mixin to allow OpSec's proper protection handling
opsec.option.disableTelemetry.tooltip: Block telemetry data sent to Mojang
opsec.option.showAlerts.tooltip: Show chat messages when tracking detected
opsec.option.logDetections.tooltip: Log detection events to game log
opsec.option.debugAlerts.tooltip: Show alerts for all probed keys, even unchanged ones
opsec.button.refresh.tooltip:
Revalidate all accounts
Invalid tokens will be marked red
